case_title: GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORPORATION VS HENRY DAREN C.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,082.95 FILED BY GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HENRY DAREN C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HENRY DAREN C.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENRY DAREN C. $1,082.95 PRINCIPAL, $59.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,141.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $35.98 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT HENRY DAREN C.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HENRY DAREN C.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,133.73 AS TO DEFENDANT HENRY DAREN C.
